title: Heptapleurum burkillii

It is a member of the genus Heptapleurum, which consists of several species of shrubs and climbers native to Southeast Asia. The plant is native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. Within the Araliaceae family, Heptapleurum burkillii is part of the subfamily Aralioideae. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Araliaceae family.
